query:
SELECT id, name, phone, email, source, createdAt FROM trialSignups WHERE source = 'facebook' ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 10;
SELECT id, name, source, createdAt FROM trialSignups ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 10;
